channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Labor forecasts higher migration amid Coalition and One Nation calls for lower numbers
item.description: The Albanese government now anticipates an additional 35,000 migrants staying in Australia this financial year, raising net overseas migration estimates from 260,000 to 295,000. Despite forecasts for ...

item.title: Montreal-Minnesota PWHL Game 5 Postponed for Health Precautions, No New Illnesses Reported
item.description: The deciding Game 5 of the PWHL semifinal between the Montreal Victoire and Minnesota Frost was postponed on Monday evening due to player safety concerns related to illness. The game, initially schedu...

item.title: Profile of Nollywood actor Alexx Ekubo
item.description: The article presents a profile of Alexx Ekubo, a Nigerian actor, model, entertainer and humanitarian who has become one of Nollywood’s notable screen personalities. It positions him as a familiar face...

item.title: Assessing New Zealand Citizenship: Limitations of a Multiple-Choice Test
item.description: New Zealand plans to introduce a citizenship test in late 2027, requiring aspiring citizens to achieve at least 75% in a 20-question multiple-choice exam. Minister of Internal Affairs Brooke Van Velde...

item.title: Orlando Pirates Close in on Premiership Title After Sundowns Shocked by TS Galaxy
item.description: In a thrilling twist in the 2025-26 Betway Premiership season, Orlando Pirates are poised to end Mamelodi Sundowns’ eight-year title dominance. Sundowns, who have been the powerhouse of South African ...

item.title: Yanga finalises plans for new stadium construction with GSM
item.description: Young Africans, one of Tanzania’s top football clubs, is moving forward with a major stadium project after a final high-level meeting at their headquarters today, May 12, 2026. The meeting gathered to...

item.title: Young female elephant dies after falling from cliff near Nilambur
item.description: A young female elephant, estimated to be around 12 years old, tragically died after falling from a steep cliff along the Nadugani ghat road near Nilambur, Kerala. Forest officials reported that the el...

item.title: Australian and US markets ease as semiconductor gains cool
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open slightly lower following a pullback in US semiconductor stocks. Both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite slipped from record highs after April's US CPI data indicat...

item.title: Australia imposes sanctions on Iranian officials over human rights abuses
item.description: The Australian government has announced targeted sanctions against seven senior Iranian officials and four entities due to their involvement in the oppression of women and the broader public under Ira...

item.title: Arvind Kejriwal calls for clear communication on India’s economic condition
item.description: On Tuesday, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) national convener Arvind Kejriwal expressed concern over the present state of the Indian economy and urged the Centre to be transparent with citizens. Speaking at a p...

item.title: Michael and La Toya Jackson in New York: Rare Candid Photos from 1977
item.description: In 1977, Michael Jackson moved to New York City to film the musical movie The Wiz, in which he played the Scarecrow. During this time, he shared a Manhattan apartment with his sister La Toya Jackson. ...

item.title: Northern Saskatchewan man fatally attacked by bear near airstrip
item.description: A man in northern Saskatchewan tragically lost his life following an encounter with a bear near a local airstrip. The incident highlights the dangers of wildlife interactions in remote areas, where en...

item.title: House Names 11 Prosecutors for Sara Duterte’s 2026 Impeachment Trial
item.description: The House of Representatives has officially selected 11 prosecutors for Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial, resuming preparations after last year’s attempt was blocked by the Supreme Cour...

item.title: Possible Successors and Contenders for Labour Leadership
item.description: The political future of Labour leader Sir Keir Starmer is under scrutiny, with calls for his resignation coming from his home secretary, several ministers, and over 80 MPs. Despite this pressure, ther...

item.title: Trump Admits He Does Not Consider Americans' Financial Situations in Iran War Decisions
item.description: During a press interaction on May 12, 2026, former President Donald Trump made a statement indicating that Americans' financial situations do not influence his decision-making regarding the Iran war. ...

item.title: India Cautions China Over Support to Pakistan’s Military Operations
item.description: New Delhi has urged China to carefully consider the reputational consequences of providing support to Pakistan, which is widely regarded as a state that sponsors terrorist activities. This comes after...

item.title: Nottingham Alt-Country Band Divorce Continues as a Two-Piece After Line-Up Changes
item.description: Nottingham alt-country band Divorce has announced that they will continue as a two-piece following the departure of drummer Kasper Sandstrom and lead guitarist Adam Peter Smith, who are stepping away ...

item.title: Director of RGS Group faces fraud charges in Tongaat Hulett business rescue case
item.description: Aquil Rajahussen, director of the Mozambican-based RGS Group, appeared in Randburg Magistrate’s Court on Tuesday facing fraud charges linked to Tongaat Hulett’s business rescue bidding process. Rajahu...

item.title: Profile of Wes Streeting, Labour politician seeking party leadership
item.description: Wes Streeting, a prominent figure within the Labour Party, has announced his intention to vie for the leadership of the party. Known for his approachable and charismatic personality, Streeting hails f...

item.title: Top 5 Nigerian Universities With Most Applications in 2026
item.description: As the 2026 JAMB admission season don waka finish, e clear say students dey choose universities based on more than just prestige. Lagos State University (LASU) top the list again with 84,426 first-cho...
